sect2.title: Introduction to SDL3
sect2.para: The Simple DirectMedia Layer Version 3 (SDL3 for short) is a cross-platform library designed to make it easy to write multimedia software, such as games and emulators. It is the new version of SDL and provides more features than SDL2.

tip.para: After you install this package, you should also install for SDL2 support if you need it. The amount of packages that use this package is very low so consider SDL2 support a requirement.

sect2.para: alsa-lib, &gbm;, , libusb, &opengl;, Pipewire, PulseAudio, Vulkan-Loader, Wayland-Protocols, libxkbcommon, and Xorg Libraries
hidapi (with libusb), ibus, JACK2, and sndio

sect2.title: Installation of SDL3
sect2.para: Install SDL3 by running the following commands:

screen.userinput:
mkdir build && cd build &&
cmake -D CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr \ -D CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \ -D SDL_TEST_LIBRARY=OFF \ -D SDL_STATIC=OFF \ -D SDL_RPATH=OFF \ -W no-dev -G Ninja .. &&
ninja

sect2.para: If you want to build the tests, issue the following commands:

screen.computeroutput:
mkdir ../build-tests && cd ../build-tests &&
cmake -D CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr \ -D CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \ -D SDL_STATIC=OFF \ -D SDL_RPATH=OFF \ -D SDL_TESTS=ON \ -D SDL_INSTALL_TESTS=ON \ -W no-dev -G Ninja .. &&
ninja && DESTDIR=$PWD/TESTS ninja install

sect2.para: Now you will be able to run the tests in TESTS/usr/libexec/installed-tests/SDL3. You will have to run the tests individually. Some of them may need to be manually killed and audio will need to be working so that you can hear from the default audio output. Make sure SDL3 is installed before running the tests, or use the LD_PRELOAD variable to preload libSDL3.so from ../build for each test.

sect2.title: lib32 Installation of SDL3
sect2.para: Install lib32-SDL3 by running the following commands:

screen.userinput:
cd ../ && rm -rf build build-tests && mkdir build && cd build &&
CC="gcc -m32" CXX="g++ -m32" \ PKG_CONFIG_PATH=/usr/lib32/pkgconfig \ cmake -D CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr \ -D CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR=lib32 \ -D CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \ -D SDL_TEST_LIBRARY=OFF \ -D SDL_STATIC=OFF \ -D SDL_RPATH=OFF \ -W no-dev -G Ninja .. &&
ninja
DESTDIR=$PWD/DESTDIR ninja install && cp -vr DESTDIR/usr/lib32/* /usr/lib32 && rm -rf DESTDIR && ldconfig

sect2.title: Command Explanations
sect2.para: -D SDL_TEST_LIBRARY=OFF: This parameter disables building an unnecessary static library meant for the tests. It gets built in the tests compilation.
-D SDL_STATIC=OFF: This parameter disables building static libraries.
-D SDL_RPATH=OFF: This parameter disables installing with rpath. It can cause security issues otherwise.

listitem.para: contains functions that provide low level access to audio, keyboard, mouse, joystick, 3D hardware via OpenGL, and 2D frame buffer across multiple platforms
